/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -ccbin=/usr/bin/g++-11  --generate-code=arch=compute_86,code=[compute_86,sm_86] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/vorpalite.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vorpalite.dir/__/__/lib/geogram/voronoi/cuda/geo_checkpoint.cpp.o -o CMakeFiles/vorpalite.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/home/shadeform/cudageom/geogram-cuda/build_cuda/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -lm -lpthread ../../../lib/libgeogram_cuda.a  -ldl -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt
